name: lighttpd
explanation: Lighttpd's `mod_status` exposes a single canonical status page at `/server-status` with the `?auto` (or `?format=plain` on Lighttpd 2) query string for machine-readable output. The check itself even auto-appends the suffix variant when the first attempt returns no metrics. A generic HTTP path probe against `http://%%host%%/server-status?auto` on port 80 (or whatever the admin port is) is sufficient. No credentials are required by default.
notes: Mirrors the apache mod_status pattern (B). The check probes `?auto` first then falls back to `?format=plain` for Lighttpd 2.
